member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.DocumentIngestionController.UploadDocument(WebAPI.Models.UploadDocumentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upload a single document page to be processed and stored in the knowledge graph
member.returns: Processing result with document ID and extraction summary
member.remarks:
Sample request:
POST /api/v1/DocumentIngestion/document { "source": "Confluence", "externalId": "DOC-123", "title": "API Authentication Guide", "content": "The .NET Core application uses OAuth2 for authentication...", "pageNumber": 1, "lastModified": "2024-01-15T14:30:00Z", "metadata": { "author": "Jane Doe", "space": "DEV" } }

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.DocumentIngestionController.UploadDocumentBatch(WebAPI.Models.BatchUploadRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upload multiple document pages in a single batch operation
member.param: Batch of document pages to process
member.returns: Batch processing results with status for each page

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.FindRelated(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find related documents based on entity and relationship criteria
member.param: Type of entity to search for (Technology, Person, Project)
Optional relationship type to filter by
member.returns: Graph of related documents and entities
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET /api/v1/Query/related?source=Confluence&entityType=Technology&entityName=.NET&depth=2
Returns a graph showing all entities related to .NET and documents that mention them.

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.SearchByEntity(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search for documents by entity name with advanced filtering
member.param: Name of the entity to search for (supports partial matching)
Filter documents modified after this date
Filter documents modified before this date
member.returns: Paginated list of documents containing the entity
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET /api/v1/Query/search?entityName=authentication&entityType=Concept&source=Confluence&page=1&pageSize=10
Returns documents that mention authentication concepts from Confluence.

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetStatistics(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get statistics about entities in the knowledge graph
member.returns: Entity statistics including counts by type and most frequent entities
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET /api/v1/Query/statistics
Returns statistics about the knowledge graph including: - Total entities by type - Most frequently mentioned entities - Growth trends

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetDocumentHistory(System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET /api/v1/Query/document/123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000/history
Returns the change history of a document showing how extracted entities evolved over time.

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetDocuments(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get documents by source and date range

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.NavigateGraph(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Navigate the graph from a starting entity
member.returns: Subgraph starting from the specified entity

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.FindPaths(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: All paths between the two entities

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetBatchStatus(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Batch processing status with detailed results
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET /api/v1/Query/batch/batch_123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000/status
Returns the current status of a batch processing operation including: - Overall progress - Individual document results - Processing metrics

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetBatches(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all batches with optional filters

member.name: M:WebAPI.Controllers.QueryController.GetMockBatchStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Mock implementation for batch status - replace with actual repository call

member.name: P:WebAPI.Models.UploadDocumentRequest.Content
member.example: This document describes how to implement OAuth2 authentication...
